'''Rixes Antab''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Thief/Legends|thief]] who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he once stole a shipment of [[Gorg/Legends|chubas]] intended for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. By doing this, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] posted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] later captured him alive, when he was on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] attempting to find [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]] involving the connection between Gardulla and the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]].

==Behind the scenes==
Rixex Antab's bounty in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' is worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
